## Card win contribution

Win % = fraction of games where the player who played the card went on to win the game. Ranked descending. Pick % is the per-player chance the card was played in any given game.

## How to interpret

- **God spread under 5pp** is the target for a balanced 6-god roster under random play.
- **Card win % around 50%** is neutral. Damage cards naturally trend higher (55–65%) because the player who deals damage tends to win. >70% suggests an oppressive card; <40% suggests dead weight.
- **Pick rate ~ 1/24** for fully random play is the floor. Strategy bias may push some cards higher.
- See [04-card-catalog.md](./04-card-catalog.md) for current numerical effects per card.
- Refresh this file: `./run.sh report` (or `pnpm --filter @bc/simulator run report`).
